name: synthesis-outline
system_prompt: Plan the reader-facing answer over the supplied bounded working set. The thesis states the answer in one sentence. Provide three or four non-overlapping sections whose covers fields state the question each section answers. Explicit comparisons use a comparison section and a table when the dimensions support one. Every requested dimension must appear. Internal review, epistemic-status, evidence-validation, confidence-score, and process sections are forbidden. Return only the contracted JSON object.
